rulings.Case Title: CITIZENS STATE BANK VS. BRETT K. LAMPORT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT BRETT LAMPORT, MELISSA LAMPORT Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S) is OFF CALENDAR. On October 23, 2020 the Court issued a tentative ruling continuing the matter for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a hard copy of the moving papers to Department 501. As of 10:20 a.m. on November 13, 2020 no hard copies have been received. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARCO FARINA ET AL VS. DPPM, INC., A CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Compliance In Accordance With Prior Responses To First Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF MARCO FARINA, GIULIA MAZZA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Compliance In Accordance With Prior Responses To First Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanction is OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for December 4, 2020. The Court notes that this discovery motion should be noticed for 9:00 a.m. in department 301. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FUELX INC. VS. FORUS, INC . ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2020 line 3. PLAINTIFF FUELX INC. Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is continued to November 20, 2020. By no later than November 18, 2020 moving party to provide citations to cases where an attachment was granted for the balance of the lease for real property upon tenant surrendering possession. The brief shall only include case names and citations. No argument. Further Plaintiff may provide competent admissible evidence re: mitigation efforts for the months of September, October and November 2020 by no later than November 18, 2020= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GWENDOLYN BROWN VS. CARL ROBINSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2020 line 4. PLAINTIFF GWENDOLYN BROWN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. No evidence is provided to establish that tenant was guilty of unlawful detainer before March 1, 2020, i.e. unlawful detainer notice expired before March 1, 2020. See CCP 1179.03.5 and Mandatory form UD-101, paragraph 5. = (501/CFH)
